store_headline: Dark Music WordPress Theme for Solo Artists
store_subheadline: For solo artists, DJs, and electronic musicians who want a dark, bold online presence
features: Event listing and tour date functionality
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
WooCommerce integration for merchandise and music sales
Product quick view and wishlist functionality
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Glitch and VHS overlay aesthetic with neon purple/blue on dark — built for the electronic music underground
Solo-artist-centric architecture: horizontal scroller, interactive link sections, and Spotify-style UI built for a single artist's brand
Five distinct homepage layouts — including Lateral Menu and Horizontal Scroller — for dark electronic artists
Multi-currency support serves the international audiences solo electronic artists and DJs actually build
WooCommerce merch store integrates directly with the dark aesthetic — no visual clash with artist identity
The dark electronic alternative to minimalist music themes — built for artists whose website should have edge
Discography, audio playlists, tour dates, video galleries, and wishlist — the complete solo artist toolkit
key_benefits: Build a dark cinematic website with glitch effects matching electronic music's aesthetic
Showcase releases, playlists, and tour dates in a solo artist identity
Attract fans of dark pop, synth, and electronic with genre-signaling visuals
Sell merch internationally with built-in currency switching for global audiences
Convert visitors with interactive layouts — horizontal scroller, lateral nav, Spotify-style UI
Launch a complete solo artist presence: discography, events, videos, and WooCommerce merch
design_features: Dark, gloomy homepage templates with glitch visual effects
Multiple layout options: Main Home, Solo Artist, Lateral Menu, One-Page, Horizontal Scroller
Album and release showcase with audio player
Custom music player with playlist support
use_cases: Dark Pop and Alternative Artist Sites
